pi_items.source: Downloaded real StationXML data directly from IRIS FDSN WS API.
Downloaded real StationXML data directly from IRIS FDSN WS API.
Downloaded StationXML shows the station latitude is approximately -20.088, which is above the minimum limit of -21.0.
Downloaded StationXML shows the station latitude is approximately -20.088, which is below the maximum limit of -19.0.
Downloaded StationXML shows the station longitude is approximately 146.25, which is above the minimum limit of 145.0.
Downloaded StationXML shows the station longitude is approximately 146.25, which is below the maximum limit of 147.0.
Downloaded StationXML contains 152 and 46 channels respectively for the two epochs, satisfying the minimum requirement of 3.

privileged_info_summary: The StationXML data comes directly from the IRIS FDSN web service and is non-synthetic. The station and network codes correspond to IU and CTAO, as verified directly from the dataset. The station's actual coordinates (-20.088, 146.25) accurately fall within the expected broad bounding boxes of -21.0 to -19.0 for latitude and 145.0 to 147.0 for longitude. The station data includes over 40 valid channels, securely satisfying the required minimum of 3 channels.
